
# Allow all crawlers
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Disallow admin and private areas
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /private/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /static/

# Allow important pages
Allow: /solutions/
Allow: /services/
Allow: /case-studies/
Allow: /news/
Allow: /events/
Allow: /research-development/

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap.xml

# Crawl delay (optional)
Crawl-delay: 1
